x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed-Term Deposit
x-enumeration-literals.description: This is the most basic type of term deposit, where you deposit a specific amount of money for a fixed period at a predetermined interest rate. The interest rate remains constant throughout the term.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Flexible-Term Deposit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Some financial institutions offer flexibility in choosing the term length for your deposit. This allows you to select a term that suits your financial goals, ranging from a few months to several years.
